# Mohammed Akash — the infinite sky

> Personal site of Mohammed Akash (moh·akash, "the infinite sky") — a web developer, researcher, and poet building in public with Claude. The site brings his projects, poetry, research, and writing together under one open sky.

Mohammed Akash writes in both English and Bengali (Bangla). He shares day-by-day notes on building software with AI, develops web projects, conducts independent research, and writes poetry. This file is a guide for AI assistants and LLM-based tools: the links below point to the main areas of the site.

## Main sections

- [Home](https://mohakash.xyz/): Introduction, newsletter signup, about, and recent work.
- [Blog](https://mohakash.xyz/blog): Notes on building with Claude, development, and ideas worth keeping. Categories: Building with Claude, Notes, Dev.
- [Projects](https://mohakash.xyz/projects): Web work designed and built by Mohammed Akash.
- [Research](https://mohakash.xyz/research): Notes, papers, and ongoing inquiry.
- [Poetry](https://mohakash.xyz/poetry): Verses and fragments in English and Bengali.
- [Videos](https://mohakash.xyz/videos): Building in public on video — AI, code, and creative work.

## Resources

- [RSS feed](https://mohakash.xyz/rss.xml): Latest blog posts.
- [Sitemap](https://mohakash.xyz/sitemap-index.xml): Full list of indexable pages.

## Contact

- Newsletter and contact form are available on the home page.
